name: The Jeffersonian
tagline: Historic living, reimagined in the heart of Jefferson, Iowa.
metaDescription: The Jeffersonian transforms Jefferson, Iowa's historic 1921 high school into 25 distinctive apartments — efficiency to three-bedroom — blending preserved character with modern comfort.

hero.heading: A landmark, restored as home.
hero.subheading: Twenty-five one-of-a-kind apartments inside Jefferson's beloved 1921 schoolhouse — where original character meets thoughtfully modern living.

footerNote: The Jeffersonian is an adaptive-reuse restoration of the former Jefferson High School, listed for its historic significance and renewed for the next century of community life.
